message:
test(core): add FleetScrollbackCoordinator integration tests at 200-pane scale

Adds 4 integration tests validating the coordinator pipeline end-to-end:
- coordinator_200_pane_emergency_evicts_all_warm: verifies emergency
  cleanup clears all warm data while preserving hot tier
- coordinator_200_pane_critical_partial_eviction: verifies proportional
  eviction under critical pressure reduces warm bytes
- coordinator_normal_pressure_no_eviction: verifies no action under normal
- coordinator_memory_stays_under_1gb_at_200_panes: validates the key
  acceptance criterion that 200 panes stay under 1 GB total memory

All 18 integration tests passing (14 existing + 4 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
